reason_for_decision: The article clears the pass threshold by explaining fusion as a process of alignment, association, and operator support rather than as a generic software feature.
strengths: The article is beginner-friendly while still preserving the hard parts of fusion such as time, spatial, and semantic alignment.
It makes object-level and situation-level fusion easier to understand than most introductory pieces do.
The operator-workflow sections keep the article practical instead of purely conceptual.
summary_assessment: This is a strong pass for a foundation article. It explains multi-sensor fusion clearly and keeps the relationship between technical correlation and operator trust visible.
